recommendations.title: SLC Punk
recommendations.overview: Two former geeks become 1980s punks, then party and go to concerts while deciding what to do with their lives.

recommendations.title: Wandering Stars
recommendations.overview: This film follows the making of Nekfeu's 3rd album, between Paris, Japan, Greece and the United States.

recommendations.title: Nirvana: Unplugged In New York
recommendations.overview: A live album by American rock band Nirvana, the album features an acoustic performance recorded at Sony Music Studios in New York City on 18 November 1993, for the television series MTV Unplugged.

recommendations.title: A
recommendations.overview: A young alcoholic ambient musician locks himself in his apartment on a dangerous seven day bender as he attempts to finish his upcoming album.

recommendations.title: Find Me Falling
recommendations.overview: After a failed comeback album, a rock star retreats to a cliffside home on Cyprus, only to find his new life complicated by visitors — and an old flame.

recommendations.title: Moonwalker
recommendations.overview: This fantastical movie inspired by the music of Michael Jackson features imaginative interpretations of hit tracks from the iconic 1987 album “Bad”.
recommendations.director: Colin Chilvers, Will Vinton, Jerry Kramer, Jim Blashfield

recommendations.title: Studio 666
recommendations.overview: Legendary rock band Foo Fighters move into an Encino mansion steeped in grisly rock and roll history to record their much anticipated 10th album. Once in the house, Dave Grohl finds himself grappling with supernatural forces that threaten both the co

recommendations.title: Fierce
recommendations.overview: Talent and passion for music can take one to the very top. On the way, however, there are going to be showbiz traps.

recommendations.title: Karol G: Tomorrow Was Beautiful
recommendations.overview: Karol G pulls back the curtain on her rise to stardom while navigating a sold-out stadium tour, creating new music and releasing a new album.

recommendations.title: Patti Cake$
recommendations.overview: Straight out of Jersey comes Patricia Dombrowski, a.k.a. Killa P, a.k.a. Patti Cake$, an aspiring rapper fighting through a world of strip malls and strip clubs on an unlikely quest for glory.
